title: Taco's Flat [Blue]
description: A simple flat pack for PvP reducing visual clutter and editing many crucial textures.
body:
A simple "flat" texutre pack meant for crystal PvP, especially on anarchy servers like 2b2t. Meant to improve your PvP experience by reducing a lot of visual clutter.

Currently, changes have been made to the following textures:

- Ender Pearls
- End Crystals
- Totems
- XP Bottles
- Bedrock
- Obsidian
- Golden aApples
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Pickaxe
- Elytra (item)

To use, simply put the ZIP file into your resource packs folder and load it from the resource packs menu in-game.
